creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 216785
v1

Moin moin 

The attached patch [2] fixes butt, so that media players are displayed in the dropdown, to forward track metadata from.

See the linked mailing list thread [1] for some details.



mfg Tobias

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-desktop/2020-July/000407.html
[2] https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/multimedia_butt_mpris.v1.diff
